meta.title: To Eve and Back - all stock - no quicksave reverts!!! (Full livestream)
meta.description:
Well ladies and gentlemen. I'm very happy to report that after a few setbacks at the beginning, our wonderful Eve plane the "Pants Destroyer" successfully made it to Eve AND back with out reverting to a quick save once! It was crazy scary, my heart was racing the whole time, but I'm so happy it all worked out!

Thanks to those who watched live in Mission Control on twitch for all the support through out the 5 hour mission. You can tune in live by following me on twitch @ everydayastronaut

As always, make sure and find me on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut

All music played in the livestream was written by me (Tim Dodd) and may be available sometime in the future.
